cards.title: Timesheet → Invoice Pipeline
cards.body: Harvest or Toggl entries flow into a weekly review queue, get matched to the right client + project + rate, and generate draft invoices in QuickBooks or Xero on your billing day. Partners review the diff, not the raw data. For {{situationDetail}}, we'd add a 'non-billable sanity check' step so the ops lead catches the quiet 8 hours nobody tagged.
cards.metric: Billing cycle from 2 days to ~90 minutes

cards.title: Client Reporting Auto-Generation
cards.body: Monthly client reports pull from GA4, Meta, LinkedIn Ads, and the project's Notion log into a branded template, with a one-paragraph commentary draft generated from the deltas. The account lead edits tone and hits send — no more Sunday-night report scramble.
cards.metric: ~6 hours/account/month saved; reports go out on time

cards.title: Lead Qualification
cards.body: Inbound form submissions get enriched (Clearbit-style), scored against your ICP, and either booked straight into Calendly or routed to a human for a judgment call. Low-fit leads get a polite decline template instead of ghosting, which protects your referral reputation.
cards.metric: ~2× qualified-meeting rate; no more ghosted leads

ctaLine: Typical build is 2–3 weeks for an agency of 10–40. Book a call — bring one painful internal workflow and we'll scope it live.
